feat.name: Font of Life
entries: You become a spring of healing and life, and excel at keeping things alive. Life Blossoms in your step, and death flees in your wake.

items: Every time you cast a healing spell, roll a {@dice d10}.
If you roll a 10, you do not expend the spell slot used to cast the spell.
If you roll a 1, The spell heals for the maximum amount at the level cast, and the spell slot is expended as normal.
Otherwise the spell slot is expended as normal.

Whenever there is an {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} creature (with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}) within 60 feet of you, you can cast {@spell Healing Word|XPHB} at 1st level without expending a spell slot. You may do this an amount of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (Minimum of Once).
You recover all expended charges after a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
Casting {@spell Healing Word|XPHB} using this feature does not activate a {@dice d10} roll as described above.
